metadata.description: Curated document-intelligence plugins by Kreuzberg, Inc.

plugins.name: kreuzberg
plugins.description: Local document extraction: text, tables, metadata, images from 91+ formats with optional OCR.

plugins.name: kreuzcrawl
plugins.description: Web crawling and scraping with HTML→Markdown and headless-Chrome fallback.

plugins.name: kreuzberg-cloud
plugins.description: Offload document extraction to api.kreuzberg.dev via REST API and skills. CLI + MCP server arrive in v0.2.0.
